avatarUrl.description: URL of the user's avatar image.

createdAt.description: The date and time the user account was created.

referredBy.description: The UID of the user who referred this user.

teacherPrivateDetails.title: Teacher Private Details
teacherPrivateDetails.description: Stores private payment and salary information for a teacher.

accountHolderName.description: The account holder's name for bank details (teachers only).

bankName.description: The name of the bank (teachers only).

ifscCode.description: The IFSC code for the bank branch (teachers only).

upiQrCodeUrl.description: URL of the teacher's UPI QR code image.

referredStudent.title: Referred Student
referredStudent.description: A record of a student referred by a teacher.

videoUrl.description: Optional URL of a video testimonial.

link.description: Optional link to a project or profile.

createdAt.description: The date and time the testimonial was created.

invoice.title: Invoice
invoice.description: Represents a student invoice for fees or purchases.

studentId.description: The ID of the student this invoice belongs to.

amount.description: The total amount of the invoice.

status.description: The payment status of the invoice.

createdAt.description: The date the invoice was created.

dueDate.description: The date the invoice is due.

paidAt.description: The date the invoice was paid.

paymentId.description: The transaction ID from the payment gateway.

salaryPayment.title: Salary Payment
salaryPayment.description: Represents a salary payment made to a teacher.

teacherId.description: The ID of the teacher receiving the payment.

hourlyRate.description: The hourly rate for the teacher.

totalHours.description: The total hours worked for this payment period.

amount.description: The total amount paid (calculated from hourlyRate * totalHours).

paymentDate.description: The date the payment was made.

title.description: The title of the blog post.

content.description: The main content of the blog post in HTML format.

imageUrl.description: Optional URL of the post's feature image.

likes.description: A list of user IDs who liked the post.

createdAt.description: The date and time the post was created.

updatedAt.description: The date and time the post was last updated.

blogComment.title: Blog Comment
blogComment.description: A comment on a blog post.

chatMessage.title: Chat Message
chatMessage.description: Represents a single message in a chat conversation.

senderId.description: The UID of the user who sent the message.

timestamp.description: The server timestamp when the message was sent.

last_changed.description: The server timestamp of the last status change.

notification.title: Notification
notification.description: Represents a notification for a user.

body.description: The main content of the notification.

href.description: The link to navigate to when clicked.

createdAt.description: The date and time the notification was created.

isRead.description: Whether the user has read the notification.

courseFee.title: Course Fee
courseFee.description: Defines a registration fee for a specific course configuration.

recordedClass.title: Recorded Class
recordedClass.description: A recorded class session, usually a YouTube video.

/users/{userId}/teacher_details/payment.description: Stores a teacher's private payment details.

/users/{userId}/notifications/{notificat.description: Stores notifications for a specific user.

/users/{userId}/referrals/{studentId}.description: Stores a list of students referred by a teacher.

/cartContent/{docId}.description: Stores content for the cart page.

/courseCategories/{categoryId}.description: Stores course categories for the cart page.

/blogPosts/{postId}/comments/{commentId}.description: Stores comments for a specific blog post.

/chats/{chatId}/messages/{messageId}.description: Stores individual chat messages between two users. The chatId is a composite key of the two user IDs, sorted alphabetically and joined by an underscore.
